title: mimosopsis prolifica
side_effects: Mimosopsis prolifica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its high toxicity levels. If ingested in large quantities, it can also cause abdominal pain, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. In severe cases, improper use of this plant can lead to seizures, coma, and even death. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also cause long-term damage to the liver and kidneys.
